fields.name: Primary Key
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: General Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the general journal that new journal lines are created in when you choose the Journal Line button in the Incoming Documents window.

fields.name: General Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the subtype of the general journal that new journal lines are created in when you choose the Journal Line button in the Incoming Documents window.

fields.name: Require Approval To Create
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the incoming document line must be approved before a document or journal line can be created from the Incoming Documents window.
